title: Ninjacart is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Ninjacart is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Ninjacart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ninjacart:
Ninjacart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ninjacart!
